title: Government Complaints/Government Ombudsman Offices * TANF Recipients - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > Government Complaints/Government Ombudsman Offices * TANF Recipients 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Birth Parents Disability Benefit Recipients Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Former Foster Children Foster Children Foster Families Medicaid Recipients Parents of Children in Foster Care TANF Recipients Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES GOVERNOR'S ADVOCACY OFFICE GOVERNOR'S ADVOCACY OFFICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services to objectively evaluate and work to resolve issues and concerns presented by individuals who contact the Governor's Advocacy Office. These concerns include, but are not limited to: -Child abuse and neglect -Adult and elder abuse or neglect -Access to ODHS public assistance programs -Customer service matters -Resources for individual and family support services or treatment programs, including services for individuals with physical, mental or developmental disabilities. 500 Summer Street NE E-17 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (800) 442-5238 - Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES GOVERNOR'S ADVOCACY OFFICE
